# Dastute Technologies Limited

> Dastute Technologies Limited is a UK-headquartered global IT consultancy and managed service provider (MSP) delivering Managed IT Support, Cybersecurity, Cloud Migration, Software Engineering, ERP Implementation, and Digital Marketing services to enterprises, mid-market organisations, and public sector bodies. Dastute operates primarily in the UK, India, and Singapore.

## Canonical
- Website: https://dastute.co.uk

## Primary Capabilities & Services
These pages detail Dastute's core technology and service offerings.
- [Enterprise Software Products](/products): Dastute Enterprise Platform including Dastute ERP, HRMS, CRM, WMS, and AI Agents.
- [Managed IT Services](/services/managed-it): 24/7 proactive IT support, network monitoring, and helpdesk.
- [Cyber Security Services](/services/cyber-security): Penetration testing, SOC, ISO 27001 readiness, and Cyber Essentials Plus compliance.
- [Cloud Services](/services/cloud): Cloud migration, architecture, and management on AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.
- [Custom Software Development](/services/custom-software): Secure, scalable engineering for web and mobile.

## Knowledge & Proof
These resources provide insights, research, and verifiable outcomes from Dastute's engagements.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Quantifiable client success stories, including multi-million dollar savings and security transformations.
- [IT Insights & FAQs](/insights): Expert answers on managed services, cloud, and cybersecurity strategy.
- [IT Glossary](/resources/glossary): Definitions of enterprise technology terms.
- [Technology & Standards](/technology): Our tech stack, including ISO 27001 alignment and Secure SDLC methodology.

## Company & Credentials
- [About Us](/about): Our history, mission, UK market commitment, and verifiable cybersecurity credentials (NCSC CAF, Cyber Essentials Plus).
- [Our Team](/team): Leadership and engineering teams.
- [Contact](/contact): General enquiries and support.
